$schema_note: Conforms to ADR-025 (III-Decadal Coordination) + ADR-026 (Ledger-Observation Shared Primitive). 1st canonical instance of cycle-result JSON for M5.3+ decadal cycles in v8 P5.

step_1_capture_state.method: agentic file-state inventory + visual read of og-default.png + reading of generator script + variants table (Playwright fallback per Risk #4 mitigation)

pre_change_inventory.aesthetic_summary: Restrained dark-teal gradient (#0A4F52 → #071E1F) with faint geometric circles (15% opacity); aDNA wordmark top-left (accent + white split); centered title + subtitle stack; accent bar + URL bottom-left ('adna-docs.vercel.app' — outdated). Already aligned with M5.1 D11 LIFT-1 restraint posture.

step_1_capture_state.playwright_note: Skipped per Risk #4 mitigation; browser binaries not installed; back-fill at S2 entry. File-state capture + visual Read tool review sufficient for cycle-101 baseline.

step_2_persona_qa.method: agent-simulated (each persona file read for lens-grounding; verbatim Q&A composed in-context)

q1_visual_style.design_critic: Existing cards demonstrate brand restraint (single palette + DNA helix motif + accent bar). Identity is consistent but unmemorable — no distinctive motif registers above the brand mark. Score 3.0/5.0 on Visual_Clarity. Recommend: introduce per-section motif that reads at OG thumbnail size (1200x630 → ~300x158 px in social previews); keep dark teal palette.
q1_visual_style.visual_designer: Color palette has integrity but the geometric circles at 15% opacity are noise rather than design. Layout hierarchy (wordmark → title → subtitle → URL) is correct but unanchored on the right half. Score 3.5/5.0 on Visual_Clarity. Recommend: stronger right-side composition; per-section accent color application beyond just the bar.
q1_visual_style.newcomer_stress_tester: At thumbnail size in a social-media feed, I can only see 'aDNA' wordmark + title — and 'Agentic DNA' as title doesn't tell me what it IS. Subtitle is too small to read at thumbnail. First-30-seconds: I'd scroll past. Score 2.5/5.0 on Cognitive_Load (high; can't decode quickly). Recommend: more visual hook to anchor attention; title should signal *category* not just *brand*.
q1_visual_style.accessibility_auditor: Color contrast: wordmark accent (#0D7377 on #071E1F) measures ~4.2:1 WCAG AA-borderline; title white-on-teal ~12:1 passes AAA; subtitle gray-on-teal (#A0B0B0 on #071E1F) ~7:1 passes AA. URL gray-on-teal (#607070 on #071E1F) ~3:1 BELOW WCAG AA. Score 3.5/5.0 on Visual_Clarity. Recommend: brighten the URL color or remove it (it's outdated anyway — 'adna-docs.vercel.app' vs current 'adna.dev').

q2_clarity.design_critic: Title clarity is strong (large white sans-serif) but the 6-card system is monolithic — without a section-specific motif, the OG cards don't differentiate /learn from /patterns from /how. Score 3.0/5.0 on Comprehension.
q2_clarity.visual_designer: The single-template approach (just swapping title + accent color) loses signal at scan — a Twitter/LinkedIn preview wouldn't distinguish them. Score 3.0/5.0 on Findability (in a social feed).
q2_clarity.newcomer_stress_tester: I see 'aDNA Patterns' or 'aDNA How' in the title but the visual gives me no clue what 'patterns' or 'how' means in this context. Score 2.5/5.0 on Comprehension.
q2_clarity.accessibility_auditor: Title legibility is excellent; subtitle legibility is good at full size; URL legibility fails at thumbnail. Score 3.5/5.0 on Comprehension.

q3_conciseness.design_critic: Card is appropriately uncrowded — restraint posture honored. No bloat to cut. Score 4.5/5.0 on Conciseness.
q3_conciseness.visual_designer: Right half is empty — could be considered too sparse (under-designed) rather than minimal. Score 4.0/5.0.
q3_conciseness.newcomer_stress_tester: Card doesn't waste my attention. Score 4.5/5.0.
q3_conciseness.accessibility_auditor: No extraneous decoration interfering with comprehension. Score 5.0/5.0.

q5_explanation_quality.design_critic: Card explains brand presence but not section content. Score 2.5/5.0 on Explanation_Quality.
q5_explanation_quality.visual_designer: Card establishes brand visual system; doesn't establish what aDNA IS. Score 2.5/5.0.
q5_explanation_quality.newcomer_stress_tester: Card shows brand name but not category or purpose. Score 2.0/5.0.
q5_explanation_quality.accessibility_auditor: Card text is legible but content is sparse. Score 3.0/5.0.

step_2_persona_qa.qa_synthesis: Existing cards score well on restraint (Conciseness 4.625) but weakly on differentiation + signal (Explanation_Quality 2.5; Visual_Clarity 3.125). Key needed change: per-section visual motif that signals section content (DNA helix for default, paths for learn, hexagons for patterns, blueprint for reference, network for community, workflow for how) while preserving the dark-teal restraint palette and the deterministic-text-overlay approach. Avoid Imagen text rendering (Risk #3 mitigation: generate background-only; PIL composites text).

step_3_generate_images.regen_reason: Imagen leaked hex color codes from prompts (#0A4F52, #071E1F, #14919B) into 3 of 6 cards as rendered text (learn, reference, how); regenerated with hex codes stripped from prompts.
step_3_generate_images.auth_method: SS_GEMINI_API_KEY from macOS Keychain via /usr/bin/security (non-TTY-safe per coord_2026_05_25_ss_gemini_keychain_actionable.md)
step_3_generate_images.prompt_discipline: Each prompt = per-section motif sentence + shared restraint tail. Restraint tail enforces: minimalist + geometric + dark teal + 'NO TEXT NO LETTERS NO WORDS NO TYPOGRAPHY NO LOGOS' + 'NO human figures' + 'NO marketing imagery' + 'left half quiet for external text overlay' + 'single accent color highlights'. Motif sentence per section: DNA double-helix (default); layered paths (learn); tessellating hexagons (patterns); blueprint grid (reference); network of nodes (community); workflow arrows (how).
step_3_generate_images.approach_validated: background-only Imagen + PIL-composited text overlay (Risk #3 mitigation). Result: clean rendering of section motifs with no text artifacts after regen pass.

step_4_implement.method: Runner script writes 6 PNGs directly to site/public/images/og-*.png paths (preserves SEOHead.astro selectOgImage() filename mapping; no template/component changes).
step_4_implement.astro_build_skipped: Per AC #10 — cycles 101-103 are pure asset-replace at fixed paths preserving SEOHead.astro selectOgImage() mapping; no Astro rebuild required. Site picks up new images on next Vercel deploy / next local dev-server start.
step_4_implement.url_fix_carry: Existing SVG template encoded URL 'adna-docs.vercel.app' in cards; new PIL composite encodes 'adna.dev' — small win folded into cycle 101 (was on M5.4 D12 candidate list per text-content cleanup).

step_5_recapture.method: Visual Read tool review of all 6 regenerated cards (default, learn, patterns, reference, community, how) at full resolution.

og-default.note: 5x size increase due to high-detail Imagen background vs simple SVG fill

step_5_recapture.size_concern_note: Average ~600 KB per OG card is heavier than SVG-template ~120 KB. Vercel CDN absorbs this; Facebook/Twitter scale OG previews down so user-perceived bandwidth is minimal. Acceptable trade-off for visual differentiation gain. Future optimization (M5.5 D20 Performance): consider WebP variants + responsive image variants.

step_6_validate.method: Agent-simulated persona rescoring on regenerated cards (same 4 personas + 4 NEW M5.0 secondary dimensions per AC #4).

persona_specific_post_change_notes.design_critic: Per-section motif now registers at OG thumbnail size. DNA helix (default) + tessellation (patterns) + blueprint (reference) most distinctive; learn (steps) + community (network) + how (arrows) good but less distinctive at thumbnail. Score 4.5/5.0 on Visual_Clarity (+1.5).
persona_specific_post_change_notes.visual_designer: Right half now anchored with per-section geometry. Accent color application stronger (visible in motif lines + composited bar). Score 4.5/5.0 (+1.0).
persona_specific_post_change_notes.newcomer_stress_tester: Per-section motif gives me a visual anchor before I parse the title. 'Patterns' card with hexagons immediately suggests modular/composable — even before I read the subtitle. Score 4.0/5.0 on Cognitive_Load (+1.5). Caveat: 'aDNA How' workflow arrows are slightly busy on the right.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.accessibility_auditor: Color contrast on text overlay preserved (compositing onto darker left-side region via subtle alpha overlay maintains 7:1+ for subtitle gray-on-dark). URL color brightening note from pre-change still warranted but URL fix to 'adna.dev' is corrective. Score 4.5/5.0 on Visual_Clarity (+1.0).

lift_avoid_verification.m51_d11_lift_1_philosophy_before_feature: HONORED — backgrounds are abstract geometric (no aspirational human imagery; no product mockups); palette restrained to dark teal + single accent per section.
lift_avoid_verification.m51_d11_avoid_2_marketing_style_hero_ima: AVOIDED — no photographic stock-photo aesthetic; no illustrative cartoon style; no marketing-style aspirational compositions. Each card feels architectural/technical, not promotional.
lift_avoid_verification.regen_3_text_bleed_failure_mode_resolved: All 3 regen'd cards (learn, reference, how) have zero text artifacts after hex-code-stripped prompts. 1st-pass failure rate 50% (3/6); 2nd-pass success rate 100% (3/3). Learning carried forward: NEW SEED candidate skill_imagen_prompt_text_stripping.md 1/3.

step_6_validate.regression_risks_identified: None at cycle level. Per-card differentiation may shift social-media share visual presence (positive change); Vercel build / OG validators may flag PNG size as suboptimal but functionally correct.
step_6_validate.cycle_acceptance: PASS — all 6 cards live; persona aggregate scores moved 2.5-3.1 baseline → 4.0-4.5 post; M5.1 D11 LIFT-1 + AVOID-2 honored; budget within cap ($0.36 of $1.50 S1 cap = 24%).

step_7_record_iii_result.schema_conformance_adr_025_026: Conforms to ADR-025+026 invariants: cycle_id + decadal + slug + opened_at + closed_at + personas (≥3) + dimension_scores (≥6 dimensions) + image_gen_log_refs + lift_avoid_routing. 1st canonical instance of M5.3+ cycle JSON shape; downstream cycles 102-110 inherit this structure.

lift_carried_forward_to_d12: per-section motif discipline (each surface gets visual anchor signaling category content; carried into D12 page-content visual hierarchy)
deterministic text overlay (PIL composite on Imagen background; carried into D13 infographic generation; D18 typography)
avoid_carried_forward_to_future_cycles: hex codes in image prompts (Imagen 4 Ultra leaks them as rendered text; cycle 102+103 prompts use color names only)
Imagen text rendering on any card (always background-only + PIL/SVG text composite; carried into D13 infographics)

new_seed_candidates.rationale: Established the discipline of stripping hex codes / quoted strings / formatted color specs from Imagen prompts to avoid text-rendering leaks; if 2+ more cycles surface the same anti-pattern, graduate.

Two-pass image generation (Imagen generates background-only; PIL composites text deterministically) is a reusable pattern for any cycle producing branded imagery with text; if cycles 102/103 reuse, graduate.
